# CLEAR Prompt Library — Ceo Strategy

Use each prompt with CLEAR: Context, Limits, Examples, Action, Review.

## 1. Weekly Decision Brief

```text
Context:
[Paste relevant business context/source material]

Limits:
[Approvals, sensitive data, tone, length, constraints]

Examples:
[Paste a good example if available]

Action:
Create a weekly CEO decision brief from the updates below. Separate facts, risks, decisions required, and recommended next actions. Flag anything that needs founder judgment.

Review:
Before finalizing, score the output 1-5 on accuracy, usefulness, brand fit, risk, and next-action clarity.
```

## 2. Opportunity Filter

```text
Context:
[Paste relevant business context/source material]

Limits:
[Approvals, sensitive data, tone, length, constraints]

Examples:
[Paste a good example if available]

Action:
Evaluate this opportunity using ROI, strategic fit, operational complexity, brand risk, and founder time required. End with: pursue, park, delegate, or reject.

Review:
Before finalizing, score the output 1-5 on accuracy, usefulness, brand fit, risk, and next-action clarity.
```

## 3. Meeting Transcript to Strategy Notes

```text
Context:
[Paste relevant business context/source material]

Limits:
[Approvals, sensitive data, tone, length, constraints]

Examples:
[Paste a good example if available]

Action:
Turn this transcript into decisions, open loops, risks, quotes worth saving, and follow-up tasks. Add any reusable principle to the Knowledge Loop section.

Review:
Before finalizing, score the output 1-5 on accuracy, usefulness, brand fit, risk, and next-action clarity.
```
